title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama HTTP API (npm: ollama).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama (PyPI: ollama).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (pip: langchain-ollama) to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, or tool callers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (Docker image: ollama-webui).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with history, syntax highlighting, and repl mode.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline helper.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama (Maven Central: ollama4j).

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes REST endpoints powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama answers into any channel.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of helper scripts: model converter, GGUF quantizer, and OpenAPI tool-caller generator.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to summarize notes and answer questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate (ollama-rs) providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers (NuGet: OllamaSharp).

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.
